items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior for group booking with an attendee list. However, the evidence does not provide specific details or endpoints that confirm how the group booking functionality operates or how the attendee list is managed. Without concrete evidence of the implementation, it is impossible to determine if the expected result is met.
